name: ZILLOW GROUP  DL-,01
summary: Zillow Group, Inc. operates leading real estate brands, including Zillow, Trulia, StreetEasy, and HotPads. The company provides an online real estate marketplace where users can find and share information about homes, real estate listings, and mortgages, along with tools for buying, selling, renting, and financing properties. Zillow Group is headquartered in Seattle, Washington.
